component.name: skconsole
component.description: Interactive CLI interface (Metasploit-style) for selecting modules, setting targets, and deploying agents.

component.name: AgentDeployer
component.description: Handles the instantiation and execution loop of autonomous LLM attacker agents.

component.name: Exploits
component.description: Modular attacks containing goals, system prompts for the attacker, and success criteria.
